MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Marina Franco, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Nadine Elshorafa, aka Nadeen ElShorafa, is present.
Attorney, Aviv S. Bliwas, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of SEP-28-2009 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
